sources.name: Switching Costs
sources.rationale: operating margin 49% well above industry; gross margins 76% indicate premium pricing / low substitution

sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: premium gross margins 76% reflect brand/IP power; large revenue base (75B) enables sustained IP investment

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: strong 48% revenue growth; high EPS growth 85% (operating leverage from scale)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins 76% vs 50% industry (massive cost advantage); significant scale ($75B revenue); strong free cash flow (36% of revenue)

analysis: Switching Costs and Intangible Assets and Network Effect create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
